api_key.description: Imagga API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username. Never logged.

api_secret.description: Imagga API secret, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Imagga API base URL override for tests or proxies.

image_urls.description: Comma-separated image URLs to analyze via the tags/categories/colors/faces_detections streams. Defaults to Imagga's own sample image, matching legacy's no-config fallback.
